title: Reload wants to give your AI agents a shared memory
description: Reload announces a $2.275 million raise in a round led by Anthemis and the launch of its first AI employee, Epic.

title: Rivian owners will soon be able to access vehicle controls using their Apple Watch
description: Rivian is launching a companion app that pairs with Apple Watch in the coming week.

title: OpenAI, Reliance partner to add AI search to JioHotstar
description: The rollout includes two-way integration that surfaces streaming links directly inside ChatGPT.

title: Co-founders behind Reface and Prisma join hands to improve on-device model inference with Mirai
description: Mirai raised a $10 million seed to improve how AI models run on devices like smartphones and laptops.

title: These former Big Tech engineers are using AI to navigate Trump’s trade chaos
description: Amari AI is making custom AI-powered software that helps customs brokers modernize and minimize constantly shifting trade policies.

title: For open-source programs, AI coding tools are a mixed blessing
description: AI coding tools have enabled a flood of bad code that threatens to overwhelm many projects. Building new features is easier but maintaining them is just as hard.

title: Altman and Amodei share a moment of awkwardness at India’s big AI summit
description: When Prime Minister Narendra Modi prompted speakers at the event to join hands and raise them in a show of unity, all executives on stage obliged, except OpenAI's Sam Altman and Anthropic's Dario Amodei, who held their hands conspicuously apart.

title: Freeform raises $67M Series B to scale up laser AI manufacturing
description: “I think we're the only quote-unquote manufacturing company out there that has H200 clusters in a data center on site."

title: Reliance unveils $110B AI investment plan as India ramps up tech ambitions
description: Reliance has begun building multi-gigawatt AI data centers in Jamnagar, with more than 120 MW of capacity expected to come online in 2026.

title: OpenAI taps Tata for 100MW AI data center capacity in India, eyes 1GW
description: OpenAI also plans to expand its presence in India with new offices in Mumbai and Bengaluru later this year.

title: OpenAI deepens India push with Pine Labs fintech partnership
description: OpenAI moves beyond ChatGPT in India with a Pine Labs deal targeting enterprise payments and AI-driven commerce.

title: Etsy sells secondhand clothing marketplace Depop to eBay for $1.2B
description: The deal comes nearly five years after Etsy purchased Depop for $1.62 billion, at a time when secondhand clothing apps were gaining traction during the pandemic.

title: Is your startup’s check engine light on? Google Cloud’s VP explains what to do
description: <![CDATA[Startup founders are being pushed to move faster than ever, using AI while facing tighter funding, rising infrastructure costs, and more pressure to show real traction early. title: Amazon halts Blue Jay robotics project after less than 6 months
description: Amazon said Blue Jay's core tech will be used for other robotics projects and the employees who worked on it were moved to other projects.

title: Mastodon, a decentralized alternative to X, plans to target creators with new features
description: Mastodon is looking to grow its open source, decentralized social network with new features aimed at creators.

title: Money no longer matters to AI’s top talent
Google adds a camera to Snapseed on iOS
Mark Zuckerberg and his Ray-Ban entourage have their day in court
